title: 苹果园远观库克发布新机
prompt:
[中文]
在Apple Park iPhone 20主题演讲期间拍摄的业余iPhone照片，蒂姆·库克在舞台上演讲。从远处的观众人群中拍摄

[English]
Amateur iPhone photo at Apple Park during the iPhone 20 keynote, Tim Cook presenting on stage. Shot from the crowd at a distance
